name: Multi-factor authentication
description: Requires a second authentication factor in addition to the password, significantly reducing the risk of unauthorized access through credential theft or reuse.

name: Perimeter firewall
description: Filters and controls incoming and outgoing network traffic, blocking unauthorized connections and limiting the attack surface of the infrastructure.

name: Monitoring and alerting
description: Continuous supervision of systems, networks, and security events to detect anomalous activity or incidents at an early stage.

name: Periodic backups
description: Regular data and system backups enabling recovery after incidents such as ransomware, hardware failures, or human errors.

name: Security policies and training
description: Internal policies and awareness programs that reduce human errors, poor practices, and insecure behavior among staff.

name: Vendor SLA agreements
description: Third-party contracts that define responsibilities, service levels, and security requirements to reduce vendor-related risks.

name: Patch and update management
description: Systematic process of updating systems and applications to address known vulnerabilities and reduce exposure to exploits.

name: Antivirus and endpoint protection
description: Endpoint protection software that detects and blocks malware, ransomware, and other threats on workstations and servers.

name: Network segmentation
description: Logical or physical separation of the network into segments to limit lateral movement by an attacker in the event of a compromise.

name: IDS/IPS
description: Intrusion detection and prevention systems that analyze network traffic to identify and block malicious activity.

name: Centralized log management
description: Centralized collection and analysis of log records to support incident detection, audits, and forensic investigation.

name: Business continuity plan
description: Procedures and plans that enable critical operations to be maintained or restored following a serious incident or disaster.
